name: Shelk
resolution_reason: Elves remain primary, with Half-Elves, Humans, Gnomes, and Firbolgs retained as the best-supported extension of Shelk’s urban, artistic, and nature-linked identity.
future_rule: This demographic record may be superseded only by an explicit corrective release preserving contradiction history and source-backed support.
